rationale: All four events (A0, EV-001, EV-002, EV-003) confirm that client-01 is running Nmap Scripting Engine (NSE) against web-01.corp.local on port 80, evidenced by the explicit 'Nmap Scripting Engine' User-Agent string. The URL paths probed — '/nmaplowercheck1642418506' (a known Nmap http-methods/http-enum canary path) and '/HNAP1' (a router management endpoint probed by NSE scripts) — are characteristic of automated web service enumeration. All responses returned HTTP 404, confirming no successful exploitation or resource access occurred within this window. The activity is confirmed reconnaissance; whether it originates from an authorized internal security scan or a threat actor is not determinable from the evidence alone, warranting investigation to identify the owner of client-01 and whether scanning was authorized.
